title: Bare Bones x  Spryzeen's Knight Armor
description: A version of Spryzeen's Knight Armor made to fit the look of Bare Bones
body:
It's Spryzeen's Knight Armor: Bare Bones style. All features of Spryzeen's Knight Armor are present(to my knowledge). Let me know if something is amiss.

Original pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor
